settings.quote: One bar. Eighty washes. Zero plastic.

settings.body: Tested on shoulder-length hair, twice-weekly wash. Short hair? Closer to 100.
Wrapped in seed paper. Plant the wrapper, get a basil bush.
Carry-on legal. No 100ml liquid limit. Travels in the tin.

settings.eyebrow: Bars don't suit every head. Here's the honest version.
settings.title: Will it suit your hair?

settings.label: Fine / oily roots
settings.note: Lifts roots beautifully. Caffeine adds visible body.

settings.label: Thick & coarse
settings.note: Pair with our deep conditioner bar. Lather generously.

settings.label: Curly / coily
settings.note: Lather in palms first, then to hair. Avoid scrubbing.

settings.label: Colour-treated
settings.note: Sulfate-free. Won't strip pigment within 6 weeks of colour.

settings.label: Dandruff-prone
settings.note: Caffeine + scalp massage helps. Try with our Clear Skies tonic.

settings.label: Very dry / damaged
settings.note: Workable, but our Bakuchiol Bay liquid serves dryness better.

settings.quote: A bar that smells like the morning before it wakes you.
settings.body: We cold-brew Indonesian arabica for four hours, then bind that brew straight into the bar. The caffeine stimulates the scalp; the smell — earthy, milky, faintly sweet — earns its keep in the shower.

settings.name: Cold-pressed Coconut Surfactants
settings.story: SLS-free coconut-derived cleansers. Properly foamy without stripping the scalp's natural oils. The reason wash one already feels right.

settings.name: Brewed Arabica Caffeine
settings.story: A 4-hour cold brew steeped into the bar. Caffeine stimulates the scalp, leaves shine, smells faintly of a Java café at dawn.

settings.name: Cocoa Butter + Murumuru
settings.story: So the bar slips through wet hair instead of catching. Tropical butters lock in shine without weighing fine hair down.

settings.title: Your first bar: a field guide.
settings.lede: Switching to a bar takes 3-5 washes. Your hair has years of silicone build-up to work through. Here's what each wash actually feels like — so you don't quit on wash two.

settings.heading: Hmm.
settings.body: Lather feels different. Hair may seem heavier. This is the residue your old shampoo left behind, lifting.

settings.heading: Stranger.
settings.body: Possibly waxier mid-lengths. Use a clarifying rinse: 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar in 250ml water.

settings.heading: Wait.
settings.body: Lather builds faster. Hair feels lighter at the roots. Smells better between washes.

settings.heading: Oh.
settings.body: Roots stay clean longer. You may go from daily to every-other-day.

settings.heading: Convert.
settings.body: You're here for life. Caffeine + coconut + 80 washes = no going back.

settings.title: How to use.
settings.method_a_body: Glide the wet bar 3-4 times along your scalp. Massage. Rinse. Best for thick or coarse hair that needs more concentrated lather.
settings.method_b_body: Rub the bar between wet palms until foamy. Apply foam to hair. Best for fine hair, curly textures, anyone breaking in their first bar.

settings.heading: Soak hair fully
settings.body: Bars need water to lather. Don't rush this.

settings.heading: Massage 30 seconds
settings.body: Caffeine works on contact. Take your time.

settings.heading: Rinse, then dry the bar
settings.body: Stand it on edge so water drains. Critical for bar life.

settings.eyebrow: A bar lives twice as long if you let it dry.
settings.title: Add the travel tin.
settings.body: Aluminum, ventilated lid, hand-stamped Java Jungle. Drains the bar between washes, slips into a carry-on. Doubles your washes per bar.

settings.q: Will my hair go through a "transition"?
settings.a: Yes — and it's real. Wash 1-2 may feel waxy or heavy as silicone build-up from old shampoos releases. By wash 4 most people are over the line. The Field Guide above tells you exactly what to expect.

settings.q: What if it doesn't click for me?
settings.a: We offer a one-bar guarantee. Use the whole thing, hate it? Send the empty wrapper back, get a full refund or swap to a liquid Java Jungle. We mean it.

Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Theobroma Grandiflorum (Cupuaçu) Butter, Astrocaryum Murumuru Seed Butter, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Acid, Coffea Arabica Seed Extract, Caffeine, Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Quinoa Protein, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lactic Acid, Tocopherol, Parfum (Java Jungle accord), Limonene, Linalool. Sulfate-free, silicone-free, palm-oil-free.

settings.q: Is it good for colour-treated hair?
settings.a: Yes. Sulfate-free formula won't strip pigment. We'd still wait 72h after a fresh colour before first use, like any shampoo.

settings.q: Why is it more expensive per gram than liquid?
settings.a: It isn't — that's the trick. 75g of bar = ~500ml of equivalent liquid shampoo. The maths works out at S$0.23/wash, cheaper than most salon brands.

settings.q: Can I bring it on a plane?
settings.a: Yes. Solid, under 100g, not a liquid. Pop it in the tin, pop the tin in your toiletry bag, breeze through security.
